description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk constructed primarily from light-colored wood or wood laminate, featuring a smooth, natural grain finish. The desk includes a set of three vertically stacked drawers on the right side, each with a curved metallic handle, and a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main work surface. The left side of the desk is open, with a lower shelf suitable for placing a computer tower or other items. The top surface is spacious and flat, ideal for writing, working, or placing electronic devices. The overall design is functional and minimalistic, suitable for both home and office environments.
description: A light wood desk with three drawers, a pull-out keyboard tray, and an open lower shelf, featuring a smooth, modern finish.
description_view_0: The left side of the desk is visible, showing a solid panel and the open lower shelf area.
description_view_1: The desk is viewed from the left end, highlighting the wood grain and the contoured edge of the top surface.
description_view_2: The front of the desk is shown, displaying the three drawers with handles, the pull-out keyboard tray, and the open shelf on the left.
description_view_3: The right end of the desk is visible, showing the side panel and the subtle wood grain pattern.
attribute_orientation: The side with the three drawers and pull-out keyboard tray is intended to face the user, with the open shelf on the left for additional storage or computer placement.
